Function Documentation

native_proto_t native_method_lookup ( const char *  cl_name,
const char *  name,
const char *  desc 
)

Searches for a native method using the provided class name, method name and signature

Parameters:
cl_name Name of the class
name Name of the method
desc Descriptor of the method
Returns:
A pointer to a native method structure or NULL if none is found matching the specified criteria
